numeric.purpose: Hero numerical readouts only (e.g. Habits unbroken-chain count). Lora 600, tight letter-spacing.

headline.purpose: Section titles inside a page; secondary headings in overlays.

body.purpose: Task titles, prose, default text. Locks 14/24 to the baseline grid.

caption.purpose: Italic sub-notes, due dates, empty states.

label.purpose: Section dividers and metadata labels. UPPERCASE with 0.1em letter-spacing.

mono.purpose: Keyboard caps only (help panel, sidebar footer hints).

shadows.name: overlay-drop
shadows.purpose: The only shadow in the system. Modal overlays (search, shortcuts) floating over a dimmed page.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: State transitions (hover, focus, opacity changes) at 120–200ms.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Below this width, sidebar collapses to drawer.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Closure action. Reserved for dialog confirms and destructive confirms.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2c2c2c; color: #f5f0e8; font-family: 'Lora', Georgia, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 24px; padding: 4px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.88; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2c2c2c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Sidebar Link
components.description: Left-nav destination row. 32px tall, 4px radius, transparent on Sidebar Cream.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; font-family: 'Lora', Georgia, serif; font-size: 14px; color: #2c2c2c; opacity: 0.6; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; margin-bottom: 2px; transition: opacity 120ms ease-out, background 120ms ease-out; } .ds-nav:hover { opacity: 1; } .ds-nav[aria-current='page'] { background: rgba(212,207,199,0.5); opacity: 1; font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 16px; text-align: center; font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.6; }

components.name: Task Row
components.description: The signature row. Typographic bullet, serif title, italic due date, optional chip labels. 24px tall.
components.html: •Morning standuptoday
components.css: .ds-task { display: flex; align-items: center; height: 24px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms ease-out; } .ds-task:hover { background: rgba(212,207,199,0.4); } .ds-task[aria-selected='true'] { background: rgba(212,207,199,0.6); } .ds-task-bullet { width: 24px; text-align: center; font-size: 10px; line-height: 24px; color: #c0392b; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-task-title { font-family: 'Lora', Georgia, serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 24px; color: #2c2c2c; } .ds-task-due { font-family: 'Lora', Georgia, serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 24px; color: #6b6b6b; font-style: italic; margin-left: 6px; }

components.name: Label Chip
components.description: Inline tag for task labels and filter pills. Single pill style, no bordered variant.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Lora', Georgia, serif; font-size: 10px; line-height: 16px; padding: 0 6px; border-radius: 8px; background: #d4cfc7; color: #2c2c2c; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Single-line text field with Ink-on-focus border, blinking serif caret.
components.css: .ds-input { font-family: 'Lora', Georgia, serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 24px; color: #2c2c2c; background: #f5f0e8; border: 1px solid #d4cfc7; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 8px; caret-color: #2c2c2c; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #2c2c2c; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b6b6b; font-style: italic; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: Uppercase Lora label that divides list sections (e.g. 'OVERDUE', 'TODAY'). The only uppercase style in the system.
components.css: .ds-section-label { font-family: 'Lora', Georgia, serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 24px; height: 24px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6b6b6b; }

components.name: Habit Dot Cell
components.description: One cell of the habit chain grid. Empty, completed, or today-ringed. Consecutive completed cells fuse into a capsule via asymmetric border-radius.
components.css: .ds-habit-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 16px); column-gap: 6px; } .ds-habit { width: 16px; height: 16px; padding: 0; border: 1px solid #d4cfc7; background: transparent; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms ease-out, border-radius 120ms ease-out; } .ds-habit--done { background: #2c2c2c; border: none; } .ds-habit--solo { border-radius: 50%; } .ds-habit--cap-left { border-radius: 50% 0 0 50%; } .ds-habit--cap-right { border-radius: 0 50% 50% 0; } .ds-habit--mid { border-radius: 0; } .ds-habit--today { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1.5px #2c2c2c; }

components.name: Overlay Panel
components.description: Modal surface. Cream paper with a single warm drop shadow over a dimmed, lightly blurred backdrop.
components.css: .ds-overlay-backdrop { position: relative; inset: 0; background: rgba(44,44,44,0.3); backdrop-filter: blur(2px); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 32px; } .ds-overlay-panel { background: #f5f0e8; border: 1px solid #d4cfc7; border-radius: 6px; padding: 24px 32px; min-width: 320px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(44,44,44,0.15); } .ds-overlay-title { font-family: 'Lora', Georgia, serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #2c2c2c; margin: 0 0 16px; }

narrative.overview: Planner is a Moleskine page that happens to compute. The surface is warm cream stock printed with a 24-pixel dotted grid; everything that lives on the page should look like ink laid onto paper, not pixels rendered on glass. Lora serif carries every word, headings to checkboxes, because a single typographic voice is what makes a paper journal feel like one object. A single brick-red accent stands in for the red felt-tip; it appears only when the page wants the reader's eye to stop. The system explicitly rejects the visual idioms of its category: Todoist's saturated red field, Things' iOS-default sans, Notion's neutral grey, Linear's terminal density, and the SaaS-cream-with-rounded-cards template that most planning apps default to.
keyCharacteristics: Cream paper surface (#f5f0e8) with a printed dot grid (#d4cfc7, 24px spacing) as the page texture
One serif (Lora) for everything; no display/body pairing
Tinted-warm neutrals only; the single brick-red accent appears on ≤10% of any screen
Flat by default; depth from tint, stroke, and the dot grid itself
24px vertical rhythm; row heights, line heights, and label heights all snap to it

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The brick-red accent (#c0392b) appears on ≤10% of any screen. Its rarity is the point: when it shows up, something needs the eye.

rules.name: The No-Pure Rule
rules.body: No #fff, no #000. Every neutral is tinted toward the warm hue. The body background is Cream Paper, not white. Text is Ink, not black.

rules.name: The Tertiary Restraint Rule
rules.body: Pencil Orange and Annotation Blue exist only on priority bullets inside a task row. Not free-to-use accent colors.

rules.name: The One Serif Rule
rules.body: Lora carries everything: headlines, body, buttons, labels, chips. No sans. No second display font.

rules.name: The Baseline Rule
rules.body: Body line-height is 24px; row heights snap to 24px or 32px; section dividers are 24px tall. The page dot grid is printed at 24px.

rules.name: The Spaced-Cap Label Rule
rules.body: Labels (11px) get letter-spacing: 0.1em and UPPERCASE. The only place the system uses uppercase.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No card shadows, no resting elevation. If a surface needs to read as 'above' another, deepen its tint or add a 1px Dot Grey border.

rules.name: The Page-Shows-Through Rule
rules.body: Cards and panels on the body background must NOT cover the dot grid with an opaque fill except when explicitly elevated.

dos: Do lay every vertical measurement onto the 24px (or 4px sub-step) grid.
Do use Lora for every text element, including buttons and labels.
Do let the dot grid show through on body-level surfaces.
Do convey depth with tint and 1px hairlines, not shadow.
Do reserve Warm Brick Red for state requiring the eye to stop: overdue, P1, error, active caret. Under 10% of surface.
Do render counters in the Numeric style when they earn the weight.
Do use the Capsule Rule to fuse consecutive completed habit days into a single ink stroke.
Do style labels as UPPERCASE with 0.1em letter-spacing at 11px.
donts: Don't use #fff or #000. Every neutral is tinted warm.
Don't introduce a sans-serif. No Inter, no system-ui, no SF Pro.
Don't use Warm Brick Red as decoration, brand color, or benign hover.
Don't drop a card shadow on a resting surface.
Don't use Pencil Orange or Annotation Blue outside priority bullets.
Don't cover the dot grid with opaque card fills on body surface.
Don't apply border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient on any heading or numeric readout.
Don't reach for a modal first. Inline progressive disclosure is the default.
Don't invent custom scrollbars, checkboxes, or form controls 'for flavor'.
Don't add bounce, elastic, or spring motion.
Don't swap the dotted-paper body background for a flat fill.
